text:
FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 LNGC_COMBINED_EVER Lung Cancer - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 LNGC_MEDICARE_EVER Lung Cancer - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 LNGC_MEDICAID_EVER Lung Cancer - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 PRC_COMBINED Prostate Cancer - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims
